attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT TMP.MESSAGE_ID	,
TMP.CYCLE_COUNT_ID	,
TMP.ORGANIZATION_NAME	,
TMP.ORDER_NUMBER	,
TMP.SHIP_SET_NUMBER	,
TMP.SLC_SITE_NAME	,
TMP.REQUESTED_DATE	,
TMP.AGE_BUCKET	,
TMP.PERCENT_EVALUATION	,
TMP.SELECTED_ORDER_SHIPSET	,
TMP.MESSAGE_STATUS	,
TMP.HANDLING_UNIT_ID	,
TMP.RANDOM_NUMBER	,
TMP.PART_DUNS_NUMBER	,
TMP.CISCO_DUNS_NUMBER	,
TMP.RETRY_COUNT	,
TMP.CREATED_BY	,
TMP.CREATION_DATE	,
TMP.LAST_UPDATED_BY	,
TMP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE1	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE2	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE3	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE4	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE5	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE6	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE7	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE8	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE9	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE10	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE11	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE12	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE13	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE14	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE15	,
'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME,
TMP.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
TMP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME
FROM
 (SELECT MESSAGE_ID	,
CYCLE_COUNT_ID	,
ORGANIZATION_NAME	,
ORDER_NUMBER	,
TRIM(SHIP_SET_NUMBER) SHIP_SET_NUMBER	,
SLC_SITE_NAME	,
REQUESTED_DATE	,
AGE_BUCKET	,
PERCENT_EVALUATION	,
SELECTED_ORDER_SHIPSET	,
MESSAGE_STATUS	,
HANDLING_UNIT_ID	,
RANDOM_NUMBER	,
PART_DUNS_NUMBER	,
CISCO_DUNS_NUMBER	,
RETRY_COUNT	,
CREATED_BY	,
CREATION_DATE	,
LAST_UPDATED_BY	,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE	,
ATTRIBUTE1	,
ATTRIBUTE2	,
ATTRIBUTE3	,
ATTRIBUTE4	,
ATTRIBUTE5	,
ATTRIBUTE6	,
ATTRIBUTE7	,
ATTRIBUTE8	,
ATTRIBUTE9	,
ATTRIBUTE10	,
ATTRIBUTE11	,
ATTRIBUTE12	,
ATTRIBUTE13	,
ATTRIBUTE14	,
ATTRIBUTE15	,
SOURCE_DML_TYPE, TRAIL_FILE_NAME,SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, REFRESH_DATETIME
FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE
WHERE  SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE' AND (SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <=  '$$EndLastExtractDate')) TMP
QUALIFY RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY TMP.SLC_SITE_NAME,TMP.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,TMP.HANDLING_UNIT_ID,TMP.REQUESTED_DATE,TMP.ORDER_NUMBER ORDER BY TMP.SLC_SITE_NAME,TMP.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,TMP.HANDLING_UNIT_ID,TMP.REQUESTED_DATE,TMP.ORDER_NUMBER, TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC ) = 1
